zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich Vi of Honstein於大約1326年出生在德國薩辛賽希設 史維-斯特爾茲格比霍韓斯坦時，他的父親Graf Dietrich von Honstein V21歲，母親Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg28歲。他於1355年與Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld在德國薩辛曼斯費爾德 格比斯可萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1393年享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich Vi of Honstein于大约1326年出生在德国薩辛賽希設 史維-斯特爾茲格比霍韓斯坦时，他的父亲Graf Dietrich von Honstein V21岁，母亲Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg28岁。他于1355年与Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld在德国薩辛曼斯費爾德 格比斯可萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1393年享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Vi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Honstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a place so named near Dresden.

variants.name: Hohenstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Georg, Hans.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of various places so named.
German: topographic name composed of Middle High German hōhen, an inflected form of hōch ‘high’ + stein ‘rock’.

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich Vi of Honstein was born about 1326, in Hohnstein, Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Saxony, Germany, his father, Graf Dietrich von Honstein V, was 21 and his mother, Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg, was 28. He married Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld in 1355, in Mansfelder Gebirgskreis, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1393, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich Vi of Honstein est né environ 1326, à Hohnstein, Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Dietrich von Honstein V, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld en 1355, à Mansfelder Gebirgskreis, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1393, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich Vi of Honstein um 1326 in Hohnstein, Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Dietrich von Honstein V 21 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg 28. Er hat 1355 in Mansfelder Gebirgskreis, Sachsen, Deutschland Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1393 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich Vi of Honstein è nato il circa 1326 nel Hohnstein, Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Dietrich von Honstein V, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld nel 1355, nel Mansfelder Gebirgskreis, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1393, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich Vi of Honsteinが約1326年にドイツサチセンスaチシシェ スチウエイズ-オステルズジェバーッジホーンステインで生まれた時，父Graf Dietrich von Honstein Vは21歳，母Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburgは28歳であった。1355年にドイツサチセンマンスフエルダー ジェバーグスクレイスでCountess Leutrude von Mansfeldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1393年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich Vi of Honstein(이)가 대략 1326년 독일 작센 스a크시슈 슈위즈-스터즈그비르지 호h스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Dietrich von Honstein V(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1355년 독일 작센 맨스펠더 게비르그스크레이스에서 Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich Vi of Honstein nasceu aproximadamente 1326, em Hohnstein, Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Dietrich von Honstein V, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld em 1355, em Mansfelder Gebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1393, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich Vi of Honstein родился около 1326 г. в местности хохнстин, сaчсищ щвиз-остирзгебирдж, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Dietrich von Honstein V было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld в 1355 г. в местности мансфелдир джебиргскрис, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1393 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich Vi of Honstein nació aproximadamente 1326, en Hohnstein, Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Dietrich von Honstein V, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Holstein-Rendsburg, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Countess Leutrude von Mansfeld en 1355, en Mansfelder Gebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1393, a la edad de 68 años.
